span_source.text: European food recalls topped 5,000: learn how precision wiping prevents costly audit failures

span_target.text: Über 5.000 Lebensmittelrückrufe in Europa: Erfahren Sie, wie präzises Wischen kostspielige Audit-Ausfälle verhindert

approved_spans.comment: No ambiguity issues. Clear one-to-one correspondence of meaning.

span_source.text: keeping your facility protected and your business ahead of regulatory demands

span_target.text: Ihre Anlage zu schützen und Ihr Unternehmen den regulatorischen Anforderungen einen Schritt voraus sein zu lassen

approved_spans.comment: 'ahead of' metaphor preserved without introducing ambiguity. German construction is clear.

span_source.text: missing an allergen can lead to recalls, production disruption

span_target.text: das Übersehen eines Allergens kann zu Rückrufen, Produktionsunterbrechungen

approved_spans.comment: No ambiguity. 'Missing' correctly rendered as 'Übersehen' (overlooking) - no dual reading.

span_source.text: Selecting the right wiping solution is often overlooked when trying to achieve incremental gains

span_target.text: Die Auswahl der richtigen Wischlösung wird oft übersehen, wenn man versucht, schrittweise Verbesserungen

approved_spans.comment: No scope ambiguity. 'When' clause attachment is unambiguous in both languages.

span_source.text: including waste reduction and safety improvements, can reveal the cost-in-use benefits

span_target.text: einschließlich Abfallreduzierung und Sicherheitsverbesserungen, kann die Nutzungskosten-Vorteile

approved_spans.comment: List structure clear in both languages. No PP-attachment ambiguity.

span_source.text: provides the traceability and consistency that auditors expect

span_target.text: bietet auch die Rückverfolgbarkeit und Konsistenz, die Auditoren erwarten

approved_spans.comment: Relative clause attachment unambiguous. 'That auditors expect' clearly modifies both nouns.
Brand concept translated literally. No ambiguity between 'correct purpose' vs 'proper intention'.

span_source.text: how small changes prevent major issues, including labelling errors and product recalls

span_target.text: wie kleine Änderungen größere Probleme verhindern, einschließlich Kennzeichnungsfehler und Produktrückrufe

approved_spans.comment: List structure preserved without ambiguity. 'Including' scope is clear.

span_source.text: prevent recalls and reduce labelling errors, while protecting both productivity and brand reputation

span_target.text: Rückrufe zu verhindern und Kennzeichnungsfehler zu reduzieren, während sowohl Produktivität als auch Markenreputation geschützt werden

approved_spans.comment: Coordination structure clear. 'Both...and' correctly preserved with 'sowohl...als auch'.

span_source.text: delivering significant cost savings and greater operational efficiency, as well as measurable progress

span_target.text: was erhebliche Kosteneinsparungen und größere betriebliche Effizienz sowie messbare Fortschritte

approved_spans.comment: Complex coordination preserved without ambiguity. 'As well as' rendered clearly with 'sowie'.
